title: Payment of Filing Fee. Upon receipt of the complete and compliant
content: 7 documentary requirements for the application of a new license, the Department shall 8 require payment of a non-refundable filing fee of Fifty Thousand Pesos (PhP50,000.00) 9 and submission of proof of payment thereof. 10 11
